content.full_text:
January 8, 1990

REPLY TO: 4255 Clayton Road
Concord, CA 94521

Fair Political Practice Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Attention: John Wallace, Attorney at Law

Dear Mr. Wallace:

Per our telephone conversation of this date, we would appreciate a written statement from you regarding the use of campaign funds for legal matters. Lloyd Mashore was a successful candidate for the City Council, and two persons have filed suit stating that he was not a resident and should not have this position. Their attorney is asking for 3 to 5 days of court time which could make this an expensive matter. Inasmuch as this suit is a direct result of his being elected, he would like to use campaign funds for legal fees in this case. You referred to a new section in the government code, number 85802.5.

Thank you for help in this matter.

Sincerely,

Marian Staton
Treasurer of Friends for Lloyd Mashore

/ms
